creator: dave@daveg.ca
text:
If you kick off "idprio 5 bash -c "while true; do true; done"

top will show that CPU usage as "user" rather than "nice".  One could maybe argue that more columns should be added, but fundamentally, a lowered realtime priority should be in the "nice" column, of the columns we have.

If this is agreed, I'd be willing to make a patch for it.
